description_long: This recliner features a robust wooden frame with a rich, medium-brown finish, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a textured blue fabric, providing both comfort and a subtle visual contrast to the wood. The armrests are wide, flat, and made entirely of wood, extending from the backrest to the front legs for structural support. The backrest is a single, continuous panel, also framed in wood, with the blue upholstery covering the front-facing surface. The seat cushion is thick and plush, matching the backrest in color and texture. There are no visible reclining mechanisms, footrests, or additional moving parts, suggesting a simple, stationary design.
description: A wooden-framed recliner with blue upholstered seat and backrest, featuring wide wooden armrests and a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue upholstered seat and backrest framed by wide, flat wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat cushion, the continuous wooden armrest, and the solid wood frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid wooden back panel and the top edge of the blue seat cushion beneath it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, flat, and made entirely of wood, extending from the backrest to the front legs with no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous piece with no visible segmentation or separate sections.
